ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( INCLUDES(Signed_Schedule_Type__c, "Schedule G - Partner Referral to Seismic"), ISBLANK(Referral_to_Seismic_Rate__c), $RecordType.Name = "Partner" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Referral to Seismic Rate is required when 'Schedule G - Partner Referral to Seismic' is selected
